progress.onYourWay: You're on your way to receiving your Crown!

videoForm.title: Quick intro to how eAuctions work
videoForm.description: Watch short video to see how online bidding works and why it's faster and more transparent than traditional negotiations.

understand.title: Have a look at a real eAuction
understand.description:
Here's what happens when you're invited to participate. You'll:

  • Open the eAuction from your list
  • Review key details and Terms
  • Place a Pre-bid (your first offer)
  • Join the eAuction when it starts

📝 Some auctions use timers, rounds or overtime. You'll try them out soon — no pressure.

Let's go through the basics together 👉

understand.title: Before the eAuction begins
understand.description:
If an eAuction contains multiple lots, please make sure to review and accept the terms for each lot individually.

You'll only be able to participate in a lot once its terms have been accepted.

understand.title: Review the eAuction details
understand.description:
Every eAuction begins with a page listing its rules, pricing, documents and conditions.

✅ You need to confirm everything before you can join.

understand.title: Learn the interface before the eAuction begins
understand.description:
Take a moment to explore how the eAuction interface works — it will help you feel confident during the event.

📄 You can always review the auction terms by clicking the document icon in the top-right corner during the eAuction.

understand.title: Place a Pre-bid — your first offer
understand.description: Before the eAuction starts, you can suggest your initial price. The lower it is, the better chance you have to win — especially if no one bids during the event.

readyForm.title: Now try play demo eAction
readyForm.description: Now that you're familiar with the platform, you can move on to the demo section and try participating in eAuctions

languageForm.description: Before you start, please choose the language you'd like to use on the platform:

finalForm.title: One final step - let's have a tour of the platform
finalForm.description: 👉 You can skip the tour anytime and come back to it later from your profile menu
